sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ رَامِي بِالسَّعَادَةِ بَعْدَ أَنْ سَاعَدَ صَدِيقَهُ.
sentences.translation: Rami se osjećao sretno nakon što je pomogao svom prijatelju.
sentences.translationEn: Rami felt happy after he helped his friend.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj mu je rekao "hvala" i nasmiješio mu se.
sentences.translationEn: His friend said "thank you" and smiled at him.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ رَامِي أَنَّ قَلْبَهُ امْتَلَأَ بِالدِّفْءِ.
sentences.translation: Rami je osjetio da mu se srce ispunilo toplinom.
sentences.translationEn: Rami felt that his heart filled with warmth.
Helping others makes us feel happy.
